author: fix-stealth-error-handling
content:
Plan: Fix 3 bugs in stealth extension code and verify test coverage.

1. error.ts: generateErrorObject can return undefined when try block throws — add fallback return `fakeError || err` after try/catch
2. error.ts: DOMException constructor loses err.name ('SecurityError' → 'Error') — pass err.name as second arg  
3. instrument.ts: Object.getPropertyDescriptor assigned with plain '=' (enumerable) — wrap in Object.defineProperty to match siblings
4. Verify test_stealth_records_js_calls covers JS recording + error preservation

Key files: Extension/src/stealth/error.ts, Extension/src/stealth/instrument.ts, test/test_stealth.py
